description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot of green lawn with a visible driveway and walkways leading to multiple entrances. The structure features a complex, multi-sectioned layout with several gabled roofs in dark gray, creating a visually dynamic roofline. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, likely stucco or painted siding, and the building includes multiple covered porches supported by columns. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn, and the driveway leads to a garage or carport area. The overall design suggests a modern Craftsman influence with practical outdoor spaces and a welcoming front entrance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with multiple gabled roofs, light gray exterior walls, and covered porches, set on a green lawn with a driveway and walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway leading up to the house with visible walkways and lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the garage or carport area, and the extension of the roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional porch area, and the full width of the building with more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, side porch, and the angular layout of the walkways and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
